summary: The page reproduces all 10 sections in correct order with accurate text fidelity, EDS signature classes present, and correct asset references, matching the 93.2% pixel score closely. Main deductions are for the hero image being shifted right (x=913 vs 763), the hero title font-weight 600 vs 800, ISI body text color rendered black instead of #327C95, and minor video-card/thumbnail x-position offsets.

issues.actual: Image rendered at x=913px (pushed too far right via flex-end)
issues.fix: Adjust hero column widths/justification so the image sits at x≈763px

issues.expected: Body intro text color #327C95 and font-weight 600
issues.actual: Rendered rgb(0,0,0) at weight 400 for some intro paragraphs
issues.fix: Apply color #327C95 and font-weight 600 to the DESCOVY intro body text where the design shows teal

issues.expected: thumbnail x≈279, play-icon x≈441, mask-group x≈387
issues.actual: thumbnail x=311, play-icon x=474, mask-group x=416 (shifted right ~32px)
issues.fix: Align video thumbnails flush-left within the content rail to remove ~32px offset

issues.expected: Hero panel background extends to artboard edges with content centered at ~279px rail
issues.actual: Title sits slightly left of design x; spacing differs in render strip 1
issues.fix: Match content-inner rail x-position to ~279px for the hero text

layoutFailures.fix: Shift horizontally to x≈763px (check column/alignment classes)
Shift horizontally to x≈279px (check column/alignment classes)
Shift horizontally to x≈441px (check column/alignment classes)
Shift horizontally to x≈387px (check column/alignment classes)
